column1: # Partition table for the WT32-SC01 Plus with a recovery factory slot.
#   nvs       data nvs       0x009000 0x005000  (20 KB) -- Preferences storage
#   otadata   data ota       0x00E000 0x002000  ( 8 KB) -- which app slot is active
#   factory   app  factory   0x010000 0x100000  ( 1 MB) -- recovery shell (immutable)
#   app0      app  ota_0     0x110000 0x500000  ( 5 MB) -- main app slot A
#   app1      app  ota_1     0x610000 0x500000  ( 5 MB) -- main app slot B
#   spiffs    data spiffs    0xB10000 0x4E0000  (4.875 MB) -- general FAT storage
#   coredump  data coredump  0xFF0000 0x010000  (64 KB) -- crash dump capture
#   1. Both ota_0 and ota_1 receive OTA updates from the catalog/web flow
#   2. Each new image starts in PENDING_VERIFY (CONFIG_BOOTLOADER_APP_ROLLBACK_ENABLE)
#   3. If both slots become INVALID/ABORTED (bad firmware twice in a row)
#      the bootloader falls back to `factory` -- WiFi+OTA-only recovery shell
#   4. Factory partition is NEVER written to in the field (immutable).
#      Initial USB flash sets it; subsequent updates are OTA-only.
